reviews.comment:
Es una de las peores estaciones del país. Al momento de que descargue el camión combustible, se cagan en el tiempo del chófer. Dan mil vueltas, los encargados dejan muchísimo que desear. Cero empatía con el prójimo. Te boludean de la peor manera. Pero se tienen que quedar tranquilos que de alguna forma las tienen que pagar en vida al mal manejo que tienen. No pueden dejar a un solo playero con la playa llena en el turno noche. Son unas basuras!

(Translated by Google)
It's one of the worst gas stations in the country. The moment the fuel truck unloads, they completely disregard the driver's time. They make you wait endlessly, and the staff leaves much to be desired. Zero empathy for others. They treat you like dirt. But they can rest easy knowing they'll pay for their mismanagement in some way. They can't leave a single attendant with a full tank on the night shift. They're garbage!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURqcjl2U0xREAE

reviews.comment:
Si tenés Moto no te aceptan pagar con tarjeta, ni con la aplicacion, no te dejan cargar y te muestran mala cara

(Translated by Google)
If you have a Moto phone, they won't accept card payments or payments through the app, they won't let you top up your phone, and they'll give you a dirty look.
